metadata.title: Sinhala Voice Transcriber — Audio to Text in Seconds | HelaVoice.lk
metadata.description: HelaVoice is a Sinhala voice transcriber that converts audio to accurate text using AI. Upload or record Sinhala audio and get a transcript in seconds. Free credits on signup.

landing.faqSubtitle: Common questions about transcribing Sinhala audio with HelaVoice.

faqItems.q: What is a Sinhala voice transcriber?
faqItems.a: A Sinhala voice transcriber converts spoken Sinhala audio into written Sinhala text. HelaVoice is an AI-powered Sinhala voice transcriber built for Sri Lankan creators, students, journalists, and businesses — it accepts recordings or audio files and returns an accurate transcript in seconds.

faqItems.q: How do I transcribe Sinhala audio to text?
faqItems.a: Sign up for a free HelaVoice account, then either record audio directly in your browser or upload an existing audio file (MP3, WAV, WebM, OGG, FLAC, or M4A). HelaVoice processes the audio in 60-second chunks and returns the Sinhala transcript, which you can copy, edit, or download.

faqItems.q: How accurate is HelaVoice for Sinhala speech-to-text?
faqItems.a: HelaVoice is purpose-built for Sinhala speech-to-text and handles the nuances of Sinhala pronunciation and Sri Lankan dialects. Accuracy is highest when the audio is clear and free of heavy background noise; quiet single-speaker recordings typically transcribe with very high fidelity.

In Sinhala, "transcribe" is commonly translated as "පරිවර්තනය කිරීම" or "ලිවීම" — converting spoken words into written text. HelaVoice is the Sinhala voice transcriber that does this automatically using AI.

faqItems.q: Can I transcribe Sinhala audio messages (WhatsApp or voice notes)?
faqItems.a: Yes. Save the audio message from WhatsApp or your messaging app, then upload it to HelaVoice. Common voice-note formats (M4A, OGG, MP3) are supported up to 25MB per file. HelaVoice is well suited as an audio message transcription service for Sinhala language voice notes.

HelaVoice uses a simple credit system: 1 credit = 1 minute of audio. New accounts get 30 free credits on signup with no credit card required. Credit packages start small and never expire — you only pay for the minutes you transcribe.

faqItems.q: What audio formats and file sizes are supported?
faqItems.a: HelaVoice accepts MP3, WAV, WebM, OGG, FLAC, and M4A files, up to 25MB per upload. You can also record directly in your browser without installing anything.
